name: GKE Node Pool Auto-Repair Enabled
description: GKE node pools should have auto-repair enabled to automatically repair unhealthy nodes
remediation: Enable auto-repair for the node pool
remediation_steps: Use gcloud: gcloud container node-pools update POOL_NAME --cluster=CLUSTER_NAME --enable-autorepair
Or via Console: Navigate to cluster, select node pool, edit, and enable auto-repair
